title: Reunited with Shan Shan
text:
**Grace’s corner** Sadly, I have split from my parents - we had a lovely farewell dinner in Montazels. Then I hopped on a 22 hour overnight bus and was reunited with Rushan in Munich. Had a lovely 24 hours in Munich, drinking beer and eating pretzels, before hopping on another bus.

I thought I would give you all a break from Rushan’s beautiful HD photos and treat you to a low quality iPhone pic :)
